calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Continued To Aug-18-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jun-16-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Ellen Zakharian, Esq. 818-751-9787 Quill & Arrow for Plaintiff.
Kenneth Hollenbeck, Esq. 415-290-8328 Gordon Rees SCully Mansukhani for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

Ms. Zakharina apologizes on the oversight re issue of service, requests a brief continuance. The Court orders Mr. Jacobson to appear.
10:25am The Court takes a 5-minutes recess.
10:29am Court is back in session. Mr Kevin Jacobson appears via Zoom.
The Court comments and poses questions; who prepared the fee motion
Mr. Jacobson apologizes, motion filed but not served properly, will try to resolve informally.
Mr. Hollenbeck states parties will try to resolve the matter informally.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Ratara Sieng's unopposed Motion for Attorney's Fees.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling. The matter is off-calendar.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF RATARA SIENG's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents Request For Sanctions.
